original: You move out of the way of his shield at the last second, narrowly avoiding being bowled over by the impact.
The momentum nearly knocks you clean off of your [pc.feet] as he shoves the shield through where you were stood!
But the damage is done; she’s standing over you and smiling, her enormous cock growing more erect by the second. You are tripped!
Your goggles kick into action the instant the defenders shield bursts with light, shielding your eyes from the sudden flash!
The bright flash has little effect on you!
Piercing white overloads your vision, leaving you seeing stars no matter how hard you try and shake them out of your sight!
Reacting quickly, you manage to avert your gaze just enough to shield yourself from the worst of the flash and avoid being blinded.
All of his patience doesn’t pay off though, as you manage to twist out of the way of the shot just before it finds you.
Before you have a chance to react, a blistering bolt of energy smashes into your shields, pushing the emitters to their absolute limits.
You narrowly sidestep her baton as it swings right for chest.
Her baton catches you right in the chest before you have a chance to react, knocking the wind out of you!
A quick shuffle of your [pc.feet] pulls you just out of reach of the swinging beat-stick, air rushing just past your [pc.face].
The baton connects with your head, forcing you to stagger backward from the force of the blow.
You’re left seeing stars as your brain rattles inside your skull!
You manage to slide out of the way of her flying kick before it lands, just enough to catch her rolling back up onto her feet.
Getting kicked in the face with the weight of a grown-ass woman is enough to send you sprawling across the floor.
["Now go to the forums, and cry like the little bitch you are!","We call this a difficulty tweak!","Alright, the safe word is ‘police brutality’!"]
“".concat(t[rand(t.length)],"” she shouts in between hammering you with her baton.")
